final_prompt.prompt:
Create a premium automotive PPT cover slide for the launch announcement of 长安起源Q06, scheduled for September release, designed for executive presentation with breath-taking visual impact.

Style/medium: corporate automotive presentation cover with the clean authority of modern Chinese brand identity, balancing commercial clarity with aspirational atmosphere
Composition: centered title hierarchy with generous negative space, subtle grid alignment for professional polish
Subject: 长安起源Q06 vehicle silhouette or dynamic angle as the visual anchor, paired with launch announcement typography
Scene/backdrop: expansive atmospheric landscape suggesting journey and horizon—mountain ranges at dawn, urban skyline at twilight, or abstract light trails suggesting motion and innovation
Lighting/mood: the luminous clarity of early morning breakthrough, soft volumetric light creating depth without distraction
Color palette: deep midnight blue transitioning to warm amber horizon, the trust and ambition of a new automotive era
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 主标题：长安起源Q06  副标题：9月震撼上市
Constraints: vehicle must be recognizable as 长安起源Q06, text remains legible at projection scale, maintains brand premium positioning
Avoid: cluttered information layers, generic stock-photo automotive clichés, oversaturated neon effects, illegible text over busy backgrounds
